description_long: This lantern features a robust, dark wooden frame with four vertical supports and a flat, square top and base. The central body is composed of a striking, multifaceted glass enclosure that transitions from deep blue at the bottom to a fiery orange and yellow at the top, suggesting a gradient coloration. At the center of the glass, a prominent red diamond-shaped accent is embedded, adding a bold decorative element. The glass appears to be thick and slightly translucent, likely designed to diffuse light warmly. The wooden frame is accented with metallic brackets at the corners, providing both structural support and a touch of industrial style. The overall design is ornate and eye-catching, suitable for placement in upscale urban parks, plazas, or as a decorative street lantern.
description: A decorative lantern with a dark wooden frame, gradient-colored glass body, and a central red diamond accent, combining ornate and industrial elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full gradient glass body with the red diamond accent centered, framed by the wooden supports and metallic brackets.
description_view_1: This view is nearly identical to the front, with the same features visible but slightly shifted perspective on the glass and frame.
description_view_2: The central glass and diamond accent remain prominent, with the wooden frame and metallic brackets symmetrically displayed.
description_view_3: Similar to other views, the glass gradient and red diamond are visible, with minor changes in the angle of the wooden supports.
